title: SoapNoteLineItemFieldValue
description: Values entered by doctor when charting a particular appointment

clinical_note_field.description: ID of `/api/clinical_note_field_types` object that indicates type of the value
clinical_note_field.title: Clinical note field

value.description:
Value of the field. Interpretation varies by field type.
`clinical_note_field.data_type` | Value | Description
------------------------------- | ----- | -----------
`"Header"` | string | 
`"SubHeader"` | string |
`"String"` | string | If field is single/multiple select field, make sure value presents in allowed values set.
`"TwoStrings"` | string | String is seperated by `"/"`
`"NullCheckbox"` | string | Can be `"0"`, `"1"`, `"2"`, `"0"`-`Not selected`, `"1"`-`No`, `"2"`-`Yes`
`"Checkbox"` | string | Can be `"True"`, `"False"`
value.title: Value

appointment.description: ID of appointment that the value applies to
appointment.title: Appointment
